workExperience.summary: Production ML pipelines and NLP models
workExperience.description: Built and deployed NLP models for document classification. Designed feature pipelines with PyTorch and Hugging Face. Reduced inference latency by 35% through model optimization and quantization. Collaborated with product on LLM-based features.
Developed customer-facing dashboards in React and Node.js. Built REST APIs and MongoDB schemas. Implemented real-time features with WebSockets.

projects.description: Designed and built a roguelike dungeon crawler in Unity with procedurally generated levels, turn-based combat, and item systems. Created 3D assets in Blender. Published on itch.io with 2k+ plays.

projects.summary: AI tool that suggests code improvements from diffs
projects.description: Fine-tuned a code LLM on review comments to generate actionable suggestions for pull requests. Built REST API with FastAPI; integrated with GitHub webhooks. Achieved 40% reduction in review cycle time in internal pilot.

projects.projectName: Multimodal Image Captioning with Vision Transformers
projects.description: Implemented vision encoder (ViT) plus transformer decoder for image captioning on COCO. Trained with teacher forcing and beam search decoding. Achieved CIDEr score competitive with published baselines. Code and weights open-sourced.
Full CRUD task board with drag-and-drop columns, user auth via JWT, and real-time updates with Socket.io. Deployed on Render with MongoDB Atlas. Used as portfolio piece for full-stack roles.

jobDescription: We are hiring an AI Engineer to design and ship ML systems that power our product. You will work with large language models, build training and inference pipelines, and collaborate with research and product teams. Strong Python and PyTorch experience required. Experience with NLP, LLM fine-tuning, or production ML systems is a plus. You will own model evaluation, latency optimization, and deployment to production.
